name: Villa Victoria
tagline: Your Costa Brava base. Perfectly yours.
overview: Villa Victoria is a single signature villa in Roses, Costa Brava — a private haven for affluent families seeking authentic Mediterranean living. Warm, active, and deeply personal: a place where kids and adults alike find adventure, rest, and extraordinary food in one of Spain's most beautiful coastal regions. We are not about cold exclusivity — we are about making families feel at home in paradise.
brandPersonality: Think of Villa Victoria as a knowledgeable local friend who happens to have a stunning house in Roses. They know the best hidden coves, the fisherman who sells the freshest catch, and the hiking trail that leads to the most breathtaking sunset. They welcome you like family and make sure every member — from the youngest to the oldest — has the time of their life.

primary.name: Mediterranean Blue
primary.usage: Main brand color — headers, CTAs, key UI elements

secondary.name: Warm Sand
secondary.usage: Supporting color — accents, highlights, warmth elements

accent.name: Terracotta
accent.usage: Highlight color — buttons, special callouts, energy

dark.name: Charcoal Olive
dark.usage: Body text, footers, dark mode elements

white.name: Pure White
white.usage: Clean space, contrast, text on dark backgrounds

heading.style: Clean, modern sans-serif — bold and confident but not stiff
heading.usage: Page titles, carousel headlines, campaign titles

style: Golden hour light — warm, sun-drenched Mediterranean tones
Real family moments — not overly staged or stiff
Landscape-first — show the beauty of Costa Brava
Food photography — fresh, colorful, local produce
avoid: Empty spaces without people or warmth

contentPillars.description: Activities, experiences, and moments for the whole family in Costa Brava
Best towns, hidden gems, markets, restaurants, and cultural spots around Roses
The villa itself — peaceful moments, the terrace, the pool, the view
Costa Brava cuisine, local markets, fresh seafood, dining out and at home

creatives.title: Where every day becomes a story.
Adventures for the ones who matter most.
The sea is calling. And so is dinner.
Your own slice of the Mediterranean.
Mornings on the terrace. Afternoons in the sea.
Slow down. You're in Costa Brava now.
Ten perfect towns. One perfect base.
Find your favourite corner of Spain.
Live like a local. Feel like a guest.

instagramVoice.captionStyle: Short, evocative, warm. Lead with feeling, not features.
examples: Ten towns. Endless stories. 📍 Roses, Costa Brava → save this for your next family trip.
The kind of morning you didn't know you needed. ☀️
Where adventure meets the sea — and dinner is always fresh.
